description.zh: 保存用户与 AI 之间的重要纪念日，提供日期计算、查询、删除、上下文发送开关等能力。内置原生管理界面，支持图形化增删改查。本地 JSON 存储，公历日期计算，支持闰年 2 月 29 日。
description.en: Save important anniversaries between user and AI. Provides date calculation, query, delete, and context-send toggle. Built-in native management UI for graphical CRUD. Local JSON storage, solar date calculation, supports leap day Feb 29.
description.default: Anniversary plugin with native UI, date calculation and context injection.

description.zh: 纪念日的增删查改与状态计算工具，供 AI 在对话中调用。
description.en: CRUD and status calculation tools for anniversaries, callable by AI in conversation.
